<<Flight Time Optimization>>
Profit The executive has 6 hours available for reading after allocating 2 hours for the math problem.
Profit To finish 480 pages in 6 hours, the required reading speed is 80 pages per hour.
Profit The excitement level equation is E(t) equals 100 multiplied by 1.05 to the power of t.
Profit After 8 hours, the calculated excitement level reaches approximately 147.75 units.
